commands.summary: Read the current EQ values for 10 bands GEQ (old API, no source specified, current source)
Check if the EQ is ON or OFF (often doesn't work, probably deprecated)
Get the current room correction settings
Get the preset list for new-style plugin based EQ, using GEQ (old non-encoded API)
Get the preset list for new-style plugin based EQ, using PEQ (old non-encoded API)
Get the preset list for new-style plugin based EQ, using GEQ
Get the presets for new-style plugin based EQ, using PEQ
Read the new style current source EQ bands for a source (GEQ)
Read the new style current source EQ bands for a source (PEQ)
Read the new style per-source EQ bands for a source (GEQ)
Read the new style per-source EQ bands for a source (PEQ)
Read the old-style LV2 band for a plugin, no source specified (GEQ)
Read the old-style LV2 band for a plugin, no source specified (PEQ)
Read the old-style per-source EQ bands for a source (GEQ) — unconfirmed param format
Read the old-style per-source EQ bands for a source (PEQ) — unconfirmed param format
Get the current room correction mode
Get multi-room sub LPF for a slave (placeholder IP; needs a real slave to return real data)
Get list of audio outputs that support VRMS
Get the maximum capabilities of the coaxial output
Get list of supported digital filter types

setting.value: Linear Phase Fast Roll-Off Low Ripple
Minimum Phase Fast Roll-Off Low Dispersion

commands.summary: Get list of supported output digital filter types
Get digital filter for COAX output (should be 0)
Get digital filter for SPDIF output (should be 0)
Get digital filter for main analog output
Get digital filter for headphone analog output
Get digital filter for USB output (should be 0)
Get SPDIF input noise removal status
Get SPDIF sample rate switch latency
Get sound card mode support list
Get sync play extra delay (multiroom audio sync timing)
Get the active sound card output mode
Get supported digital input audio types
Get list of supported input modes
Get main/sub extra delay (multiroom audio sync timing)
Get the volume step of the buttons
Get a list of LinkPlay available
Get the list of group names in multi-room mode
Get Bluetooth (classic) device scan result — distinct from getblediscoveryresult (BLE)
Get alarm clock configuration for slot n
Get alarm clock configuration for slot n
Get alarm clock configuration for slot n
Get light operation brightness configuration (WiiM Ultra screen)
